title: Mudroom Built-In with Hooks
description: Custom paint-grade mudroom bench with shoe cubbies, brass hook rail, and shiplap backer wall. Built on-site over two days. Round Rock, TX.

title: Hidden-Cable TV Mount
description: 75-inch flat-screen mounted with full-motion arm, in-wall HDMI and power pass-through, soundbar centered below. Georgetown, TX.

title: Stairwell Drywall Repair
description: Three-coat patch on a fist-sized hole at the stair landing. Knockdown texture matched and rolled out so the repair is invisible after paint. Hutto, TX.

title: Sticky Front Door Tune-Up
description: Strike plate moved, threshold raised, bulb-style weatherstripping replaced. Door closes cleanly and the gap is gone. Cedar Park, TX.

title: Kitchen Refresh
description: Cabinets touched up, walls cut and rolled in two coats of Sherwin-Williams Snowbound, new pulls installed. Pflugerville, TX.

title: Fence Section Rebuild
description: Eight-foot fence section rebuilt after a storm-blown post. New post set in concrete, cedar pickets matched and stained. Leander, TX.
